# Locked-column whitebox-e2e fixture + migrate CrossBodyDnD/OverdragScroll (the #12936 core)

## Context

The delivered core of #12936, split out per the PR #12945 review (close-target integrity — both reviewers). #12936 is the umbrella: the locked-column whitebox-e2e fixture + ALL THREE migrated specs + the #12930/#12883 consumer-home comments. This leaf is the slice PR #12945 fully delivers; #12936 stays open for the residual.

## Scope

- Stand up the dedicated locked-column grid fixture (`examples/grid/lockedColumns`), decoupled from the devindex app after its locked-column config was removed.
- Migrate `GridColumnCrossBodyDnD` and `GridColumnOverdragScroll` onto it (un-skip; both green).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Fixture exists with stable locked regions + a documented geometry contract.
- [ ] Both DnD specs migrated, un-skipped, and green against the fixture.

## Out of scope (tracked elsewhere on #12936)

- `GridThumbDragDevIndex` migration — #12949.
- `#12930` regression-home + `#12883` repro-home comments — remain on the #12936 umbrella.

## Related

Sub of #12936. Delivered by PR #12945.
